languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus turns to Nuncius and listens intently. After a few moments, he nods.{/n} "Yes, you're right, the Rogue Trader is concerned with the ethics of the matter." {n}Eogunn turns back to you, bowing his head.{/n} "I will endeavour to temper my enthusiasm in the future."

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Манипулус{/g} поворачивается к Нунциусу и напряженно прислушивается. Спустя пару мгновений он кивает.{/n} "Да, ты прав, Вольного Торговца волнует этическая сторона вопроса". {n}Эоганн оборачивается к вам, склонив голову.{/n} "В будущем я постараюсь умерить свой энтузиазм".

traits.locale_text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Манипулус{/g} поворачивается к Нунциусу и напряженно прислушивается. Спустя пару мгновений он кивает.{/n} "Да, ты прав, Вольного Торговца волнует этическая сторона вопроса". {n}Эоганн оборачивается к вам, склонив голову.{/n} "В будущем я постараюсь умерить свой энтузиазм".

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}マニピュラス{/g}はヌンシウスに向き、真剣に耳を傾ける。数秒後、彼は首を振った。{/n}「そうだ、君が言う通りだ。ローグトレーダーは倫理的な問題に関心を持っている。」{n}エオガンはあなたに向き、頭を下げる。{/n}「私は今後、熱意を抑制する努力をする」
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g} turns to Nuncius and listens intently. After a few moments, he nods.{/n} "Yes, you're right, the Rogue Trader is concerned with the ethics of the matter." {n}Eogunn turns back to you, bowing his head.{/n} "I will endeavour to temper my enthusiasm in the future."

languages.text: {n}Der{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g} wendet sich Nuncius zu und hört diesem aufmerksam zu. Nach einigen Sekunden nickt er.{/n} "Ja, das stimmt, {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} hat ethische Bedenken." {n}Eogunn wendet sich wieder dir zu und senkt seinen Kopf.{/n} "Ich werde versuchen, mein Temperament und meinen Enthusiasmus zukünftig zu zügeln."
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g} turns to Nuncius and listens intently. After a few moments, he nods.{/n} "Yes, you're right, the Rogue Trader is concerned with the ethics of the matter." {n}Eogunn turns back to you, bowing his head.{/n} "I will endeavour to temper my enthusiasm in the future."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g} wendet sich Nuncius zu und hört diesem aufmerksam zu. Nach einigen Sekunden nickt er.{/n} "Ja, das stimmt, {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} hat ethische Bedenken." {n}Eogunn wendet sich wieder dir zu und senkt seinen Kopf.{/n} "Ich werde versuchen, mein Temperament und meinen Enthusiasmus zukünftig zu zügeln."

languages.text: {n}El {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}manipulus{/g} se vuelve hacia Nuncius y escucha con atención. Al cabo de unos instantes, asiente con la cabeza.{/n} «Sí, tienes razón, {mf|al|a la} Comerciante Independiente le preocupan las consideraciones éticas». {n}Eogunn vuelve a girarse hacia ti y baja la cabeza.{/n} «Me esforzaré por moderar mi entusiasmo en el futuro».
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g} turns to Nuncius and listens intently. After a few moments, he nods.{/n} "Yes, you're right, the Rogue Trader is concerned with the ethics of the matter." {n}Eogunn turns back to you, bowing his head.{/n} "I will endeavour to temper my enthusiasm in the future."

traits.locale_text: {n}El {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}manipulus{/g} se vuelve hacia Nuncius y escucha con atención. Al cabo de unos instantes, asiente con la cabeza.{/n} «Sí, tienes razón, {mf|al|a la} Comerciante Independiente le preocupan las consideraciones éticas». {n}Eogunn vuelve a girarse hacia ti y baja la cabeza.{/n} «Me esforzaré por moderar mi entusiasmo en el futuro».

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipülus{/g}, Nuncius'a dönüp dikkatle dinliyor. Birkaç dakika sonra başını sallıyor.{/n} "Haklısın. Hür Tacir, meselenin etik tarafıyla ilgileniyor." {n}Eogunn sana dönüp başını eğiyor.{/n} "Gelecekte hevesimi dizginlemeye çalışacağım."
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g} turns to Nuncius and listens intently. After a few moments, he nods.{/n} "Yes, you're right, the Rogue Trader is concerned with the ethics of the matter." {n}Eogunn turns back to you, bowing his head.{/n} "I will endeavour to temper my enthusiasm in the future."

traits.locale_text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipülus{/g}, Nuncius'a dönüp dikkatle dinliyor. Birkaç dakika sonra başını sallıyor.{/n} "Haklısın. Hür Tacir, meselenin etik tarafıyla ilgileniyor." {n}Eogunn sana dönüp başını eğiyor.{/n} "Gelecekte hevesimi dizginlemeye çalışacağım."

languages.text: {n}Le {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}manipulus{/g} se tourne vers Nuncius et l'écoute attentivement pendant quelques instants avant de hocher la tête.{/n} « Oui, tu as raison, {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} s'inquiète très certainement de l'aspect éthique du problème. » {n}Eogunn incline la tête dans votre direction.{/n} « Je m'efforcerai de modérer mon enthousiasme à l'avenir. »
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g} turns to Nuncius and listens intently. After a few moments, he nods.{/n} "Yes, you're right, the Rogue Trader is concerned with the ethics of the matter." {n}Eogunn turns back to you, bowing his head.{/n} "I will endeavour to temper my enthusiasm in the future."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}manipulus{/g} se tourne vers Nuncius et l'écoute attentivement pendant quelques instants avant de hocher la tête.{/n} « Oui, tu as raison, {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} s'inquiète très certainement de l'aspect éthique du problème. » {n}Eogunn incline la tête dans votre direction.{/n} « Je m'efforcerai de modérer mon enthousiasme à l'avenir. »

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}操纵者{/g}转向努恩修斯，专注倾听。片刻后，他点了点头。{/n}“是的，你说得对，行商浪人关注的是此事涉及的伦理问题。”{n}伊奥贡转回身来，朝你低下头。{/n}“今后我将尽力克制我的热情。”
